name: aws-ip-range-diff
title: AWS IP Range Change Detector
description: Tracks AWS ip-ranges.json between runs and emits added, removed, and unchanged IP ranges as structured records. Useful for network security teams, cloud firewall automation, and infrastructure monitoring.

pricing.pricingInfo: Pay-per-Event: $0.03 per detected IP range row, $0.06 per snapshot crawl.

input.title: AWS IP Range Diff Input
input.description: Configure the source ip-ranges URL and snapshot key.

awsIpRangesUrl.title: AWS IP Ranges URL
awsIpRangesUrl.description: Source JSON url. Defaults to the official AWS ip-ranges.json feed.

previousSnapshotKey.title: Previous Snapshot Key
previousSnapshotKey.description: Key-value store key for persisting the previous run's snapshot.
